CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID INT, CustomerID INT, OrderDate DATETIME);
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate) VALUES (1, 101, '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate) VALUES (2, 102, '2023-01-02 11:00:00');
CREATE PUBLICATION table_publication FOR TABLE Demo.demo.Orders;
DB.DBA.REPL_PUB_ADD ('table_publication', 'Demo.demo.Orders', 1, 4, (SELECT OrderID FROM Demo.demo.Orders WHERE CustomerID = 101));
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_PUB_ADD ('table_publication', 'Demo.demo.Orders', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Demo.demo.Orders), 0, NULL);
